title: markdown
text: # h1 标题 ## h2 标题 ### h3 标题 #### h4 标题 ##### h5 标题 ###### h6 标题 h1 标题h2 标题h3 标题h4 标题h5 标题h6 标题 ## 水平线 ___ --- *** 水平线 ## 文本样式 **This is bold text** __This is bold text__ *This is italic text* _This is italic text_ ~~Strikethrough~~ 文本样式This is bold text This is bold text This is italic text This is italic text Strikethrough ## 列表 无序 + Create a list by starting a line with `+`, `-`, or `*` + Sub-lists are made by indenting 2 spaces: - Marker character change forces new list start: * Ac tristique libero volutpat at + Facilisis in pretium nisl aliquet - Nulla volutpat aliquam velit + Very easy! 有序 1. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet 2. Consectetur adipiscing elit 3. Integer molestie lorem at massa 1. You can use sequential numbers... 1. ...or keep all the numbers as `1.` Start numbering with offset: 57. foo 1. bar 列表无序 Create a list by starting a line with +, -, or * Sub-lists are made by indenting 2 spaces: Marker character change forces new list start: Ac tristique libero volutpat at Facilisis in pretium nisl aliquet Nulla volutpat aliquam velit Very easy! 有序 Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet Consectetur adipiscing elit Integer molestie lorem at massa You can use sequential numbers… …or keep all the numbers as 1. Start numbering with offset: foo bar ## 代码Inline `code`Indented code // Some comments line 1 of code line 2 of code line 3 of codeBlock code “fences”```Sample text here…```Syntax highlighting``` jsvar foo = function (bar) { return bar++;};console.log(foo(5));``` 代码Inline code Indented code // Some comments line 1 of code line 2 of code line 3 of codeBlock code “fences” 1Sample text here... Syntax highlighting var foo = function (bar) { return bar++; }; console.log(foo(5));
